resources.string:
Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Please tap the link below to read the %1$s and %2$s.
Lama heli karo gudaha app xaalada hada
Habka Isku dheelitirnaanta ayaa qoondayn doona agabka iyadoo loo eegayo ciyaarta iyo waxqabadka telefoonka.
Muuji WhatsApp iyo fariimaha Messeger sida rasaasta shaashadda oo dhan
Lagaliyay gudaha, Lama jaajarayn kara hadda
Jaajargaraynta dhaafidda waxay yaraynaysaa saamaynta kulaylka ee teleefonka iyadoo la dheereynayo nolosha batteriga.

Marka telefonkaaga uu ku xirmo jaajarka asalka ah wakhtiga ciyaarta lagu jiro, waxa awoodda ay dhaafi doontaa batteriga si uu toos ugu xoojiyo telefonka, taas oo yaraynaysa saamaynta kulaylka ee telefonka iyo kordhinta nolosha batteriga.
Jaajargaraynta dhaafidda waa la awoodday.Waxtarka ku jaajaraynta batteriga waa la dhimi doona
Jaajargaraynta dhaafidda waa la awoodday.Ku jaajaraynta batteriga waa la joojin doonaa
U jaajar garaynaya sii qabaw ah
Boqolkiiba awoodda loo isticmaalo in lagu jaajariyo batteriga
Bilow jaajargaraynta ka dib marka heerka batteriga uu ka hooseeyo heerka jaajargaraynta.
U rogitaanka midabku wuxuu si cad u qeexayaa xarfaha dhaqdhaqaaqa ee ciyaarta, kordhinta fursadahaaga guuleysiga
Gudaha uu jiid qabashada gudiga si aad u firfirconeysiiso Guddiga Wanaagsan
Waxaad ka bixi doontaa habka kaydinta tamarta haddii aad daarto Koontaroolka heerka isboortiga Elektarooniga ah.
Codad sixir bilaash ah in la isticmaalo
Dooro 2 appka sida awoodda daaqada sabayn inta aad ku jirto ciyaaraha
Kaliya 2 appka taageeray loogu talaglay daaqada sabayn
2 appka loo baahan yahay loogu talaglay daaqada sabayn
Improve network stability when you play games. New users can try it freely for some days
In ka badan 2 saacadood ayaa toosan loo ciyaaray.Nasasho qaado ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
In ka badan 4 saacadood ayaa gabi ahaanba la ciyaaray maanta. Nasasho qaado ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
Kadib 2 saacadood midna-istaaji ciyaara ama 4 saacadood ee Ciyaaraha urursan

Marka la furo, gooyn-gaabyada ciyaarta ayaa lagu qarin doonaa shaashadda gelitaanka. Bilow oo maamul dhammaan ciyaaraha ku jira %1$s Si aad u hesho shaashadda gelitaanka nadiif ah iyo khibrad ciyaar oo habsami leh.
%1$s Waxay u baahan tahay ogeysiisyada Riix ogaysiisyada si ay u soo dirto ogeysiisyo marka ciyaaraha cusub ee la soo dejiyay lagu daro.
\"%1$s\" ayaa lagu daray %2$s. Taabo si aad u aragto.
Maya %1$s Istaraatijiyadaha loogu talagalay %2$s. Waad tagi kartaa %3$s Laga soo bilaabo ciyaarta si aad mid ugu darto (kaliya waxaa lagu taageeraa ciyaaraha leh qaabka muuqaalka ee dhul-weynaha).
Select a game app from the list. The selected app will be run in game mode.
Waxay kaa caawinayaan inaad ku guuleysato safka bilowga
Block reminders other than incoming calls and alarms
Ku siiso jawaab celin gariiro goobaha gaarka ah ee ciyaarta
Ku hagaaji waxqabadka CPU iyo GPU si toos ah si loo hagaajiyo khibradda ciyaarta
Horay ayaa loogu hagaajiyay xaalada ugu fiican
Durba lagu hagaajiyay xaalada ugu fiican. Laakiin weli waxaad u baahan tahay inaad fiiro gaar ah u yeelato %1$s.
Daar hoos u dhig dhalaalka shaashadda si aad u ilaaliso araggaaga
Nasasho naso si aad indhahaaga u nasato
Daaro dhalaalka shaashadda si aad u ilaaliso araggaaga
Fadlan fiiro gaar ah u yeelo hareerahaaga intaad guureyso
Fadlan iska ilaali inaad beenta sii wado inta aad teleefonkaaga isticmaaleyso
Daar xusuusiyaha caafimaadka iyo badbaadada ee ku saabsan indhaha,fadhiyamuuqaalka,horjeeda nidaamka qabatinka, iwm
Muga dhagaha dhagaha waa mid aad u sareeya
Ku dar ciyaaraha aad ugu jeceshahay sida Booska Ciyaarta
Samee raadadka mid ka sii sareeya ilaha maqalka la hormarinaayo
Dhammaan setinka ku jira guddida waxqabadka ayaa dib loogu dejin doonaa xaaladdoodii hore.
Marki la furo, Xakamaynta Heerkulka Ciyaarta waxa ay si wax ku ool ah u dhimi kartaa heerkulka telefoonka waxa ayna dheereyn kartaa waqtiga ciyaarista.
Intelligently adjust game parameters to ensure a better gaming experience for a long time.
Koontaroolka heerka isboortiga Elektarooniga ah ayaa loo furay. Heerkulka aaladda ayaa kordhi kara.

Iska yaree daahitaanka taabashada iyada oo loo marayo tignoolajiyada kontoroolka taabashada ee xiriirinta buuxa, laakiin tani waxay kordhin doontaa heerkulka aaladda waxayna yaraynaysaa nolosha batteriga.
Tilmaamaha sare waxay muujinayaan isticmaalka tamarta hoose iyo nolosha batarigariga oo dheer.
Tilmaamaha sare waxay muujinayaan tayada fiidyawyaha sare.
Tilmaamaha sare waxay muujinayaan waayo-aragnimada xakamaynta ciyaarta ee ka fiican.
Tilmaamaha sare waxay muujinayaan kor u kaca heerkulka.
%d day(s) of free VIP got successfully
Waad heshay %d maalmaha Qof aad muhiim u ah
Marka qeybta \"Shaashadda Sawir uga Qaad 3 Farood\" ay xiran tahay, shaashadda sawir ugama qaadi kartid ku salaaxidda 3 farood.

Marka aad ciyaareyso ciyaaraha isago dabka qaadanaya, dabaynta heerka saraha ah waxa ay yaraynaysaa jaajargaraynta awoodda batariga, waxa ay yaraynaysaa saamaynta kulaylka ee telefoonka iyo kordhinta nolosha batteriga.
Dallacaadda Xakamaynta Heerkulka waa la awooda
Taabo ablikeeshinka si aad ugu darto
Hagaajinta xawaaraha jawaabta xakamaynta iyada oo loo marayo hagaajinta buuxda ee taabashada iyo soo bandhigida, laakiin tani waxay keeni doontaa in telefoonka uu kululeeyo.
Shaqooyinka hoos ku qoran ayaad heli kartaa.
Kadhig heerka fareemka ciyaarta dhexdeeda mid \"Sare\" oo u fur shaqadan.
Waxaad bilaabi kartaa khariiradeynta ciyaarta dhexdeeda adigoo riixaya badhamada laga dheereeyo lagana gaabiyo codka +/-.
Wanaajinta Muuqaalka laguma heli karo habka Daryeelka Indhaha.
Magaca cusub waa inuusan la mid noqon kii asalka ahaa
Erayga sirta ah ee khaldan. Fadlan iskuday markale

Si wanaagsan ah u aqoonso aagagga hawlgalka ciyaaraha kala duwan oo u wanaaji si ku habboon si aad u bixiso khibrad taabasho ciyaar oo xad dhaaf ah. Marka tan la furo, aagagga taabashada ayaa lagu ogaan doonaa kulanka ugu horreeya ee kulan kasta.
Marka khadka Wi-Fi la damiyo, xirmada khadka mobaylka ayaa la isticmaali doonaa taa badalkeeda.
Waxay wanaajisaa aragtida taabasho ee dusha shay; Mar kasta oo ay ka sii xoog badan tahay qaab-dhismeedku, ayaa qiimayntu sarreeysaa.

Wanaagsanaanta muuqaalka ciyaarta. Dib u hagaajinta waxay yaraynaysaa tayada sawirka iyadoo kor u qaadaysa waxqabadka. (Kor u kicinta waxay jilcisaa sawirka iyadoo kor u qaadaysa waxqabadka; hoos u wareejintu waxay hagaajinaysaa toosnaanta muuqaalka.)
Ku hagaaji tayada sawirka sare ama xawaaraha wax qabad ee sarreeya.
Qalabka duubista waxaa isticmaalaya abka kale. Fadlan xidh abka marka hore
Dhamaan muuqaalada ayaa ku jira %1$s Ciyaartan ayaa diyaar u noqon doonta ka dib marka la soo dejiyo.
Waxaad horey u heshay VIP bilaashka ah
Saadaal sare adeegsiga CPU si loo yareeyo hoos u dhaca iyo dib u dhaca
Ma jiro isku xirka shabakada. Fadlan hubi goobaha shabakadda
Ku guuldareystay in la soo dejiyo
Ku beddel codkaaga ciyaaraha wakhtiga dhabta ah.
"Waxaad kula wadaagi kartaa ra'yi-celintaada %1$s ama nagala soo xidhiidh %2$s."
Eeg %1$s iyo %2$s wixii macluumaad dheeraad ah.
Badhanka sixirka u oggollow adiga sida khariidda shaqaynayso kuyaalo shaashadda muqaalka badhamada mugga, taas waxay hagaajin shaqada badhamada mugga loogu talagalay ciyaaraha
Indheer riix iyo jiid + ama - badhanka meesha aad rabto inaad khariiddo ku sameyso iyo kicin
Deji shaqada ee badhamada mugga loogu talagalay ciyaaraha
La dhameystiray khariidada mugga badhanka shaqaynayo, Mugga badhamada looma isticmaali karo in lagu hagaajiyo mugga, laakiin waad soo qaadan kartaa Guddiga Wanaagsan si sidaas loo sameeyo.
Soo qaado Guddiga Wanaagsan oo u adeegso inaad ku habeyso mugga
Sidee ku sameyn habeynta mugga marka badhanka sixirka la daaray?
Long press and drag \"+\" to the the Fire button
Waad kartaa daar/dami shaqada khariidada mid kasta badhanka mugga, iyo taabo Xiga sida deji shaqooyinka loogu talagalay badhan kasta.

Waad kartaa hagaajinta shaqada ee badhamada mugga loogu talagalay ciyaaraha,.Tusaale ahaan, jiid \"+\" badhanka gudaha sawirka sida badhanka dabka ee shaashadda ciyaarta,kadib badbaadi goobta iyo gali ciyaartam Hadda waad kartaa guji Mugga kore badhanka si loo bilaawo toogashada.
Si joogto ah ayaa loo heli karaa
Dareenka kordhay wuxuu hagaajiyaa saamaynta taabashada, halka dareenka hoos u dhaca uu hagaajiyo xasilloonida xakamaynta wuxuuna yareeyaa faragelinta iyo taabashada beenta ah.
Markay shidantahay, waxay siisaa khibrad kontorool oo ciyaaraha waxayna yaraynaysaa wakhtiga jawaabta xakamaynta.

Markasta oo ay sareyso soo jawaabista, waxaa badnaanaya ka jawaabista degdegga ah ee salaaxa. Markasta oo ay hooseyso soo jawaabista, waxaa badnaanaya deggenaanta aragtida muuqaalada inta lagu jiro salaaxa.
Sidee loo muujin fariimaha inta lagu jiro ciyaaraha
Saxnaanta sare waxay u oggolaaneysaa aqoonsi sax ah oo ka wanaagsan ee xakamaynta micro, halka saxnaanta hoose ay hoos u dhigto dareenka xakamayntan laakiin ay hagaajiso xasilloonida hawlgalka.

"Waad ku mahadsan tahay kalsoonidaada iyo isticmaalka alaabtayada iyo adeegyadayada. Si aan u bixino alaabtayada iyo adeegyada, waxaan u baahanahay inaan galo internetka, aan helno oggolaanshaha qaar oo ka yimaada teleefankaaga, iyo inaan isticmaalo macluumaadkaaga shakhsiyeed: 1. Ogolaanshahaaga haddii aan helno, waxaanu heli doonaa macluumaadka koontadaada si aan ugu galno nidaamka. 2. Marka la helo ogolaanshahaaga, waxaan heli doonaa macluumaadka dalabkaaga iyo lambarkaaga telefoonka si aan u dhammaystirno lacag bixinta dalabkaaga oo aan kuu siino adeegyada la bixiyo ee ku habboon. Asbaabta sharciga ah ee aan u isticmaalayno xogtaada waa ogolaanshahaaga ama heshiis aad nala gashay. Markaad taabato Aqbal, waxaad muujinaysaa heshiiskaaga xog-ogaal ah shuruudaha lagu sheegay Heshiiska Isticmaalaha iyo Siyaasadda Asturnaanta."
Adigoo gujinaya AQBAL, waxaad ogolaatay shuruudaha lagu sheegay gudaha annaga %s iyo %s.
Haa u xiriirin si toos ah Wi-Fi marka la adeegsayo shakadda mobaylka
Si caqli-gal ah u dooro Wi-Fi iyo khadka mobaylka si loo dhimo habacsanaanta shabakada. Khadka mobaylka waa la isticmaali karaa xitaa marka shabakada Wi-Fi ku xiran tahay.
Sida doorbidan u dammaanad qaad kheyraadka shabakada ciyaaraha hadda socda adoo isticmaalaya tignoolajiyada hagaajinta shabakadda ciyaaraha iska leh.
Ma jiraan shabakado la heli karo
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Messages from non-allowlisted apps will no longer be notified during gameplay.
Sabbaynta daaqada lama taageerin gudaha xaalada hada taagan
Intii lagu jiray ciyaaraha,muuji WhatsApp iyo fariimaha Messenger sida rasaasta shaashadda oo dhan
Tan waxey ilaalin inyar gudaha ah inta aad adiga lasocon .taabo iyo qabo gadaal iyo guudmar si kuwa aan lasocon
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold
Shibiibaxasha guddiga dibada laga bilaawo geeska shaashadda inta lagu jiro ciyaaraha

Habka Waxqabadka wuxuu wanaajin doonaa waxqabadka taleefooka wuxuuna ku habboon yahay ciyaaraha tartanka. Marka la awoodo, waxay heli doontaa tayada muuqaalka sare, laakiin waxay kordhin doontaa isticmaalka tamarta iyo kulaylka qalabka. Waxaa lagu talinayaa in lagu ciyaaro jawi aan heerkul sare ahayn.
Hormari sawirka tayada ciyaaraha oo dhan
Tap to view Privacy Policy and User Agreement. By tapping \"Agree\", you agree to our permission settings and agreement.
Habka Kaydinta Tamarta waxay hoos u dhigi doontaa waxqabadka aaladda waxayna kordhin doontaa nolosha batteriga. Waxay ku habboon tahay ciyaaraha aan u baahnayn tayada muuqaalka sare.
%1$sQaadan doonta saameynta kadib dib ubilaawida ciyaarta, fadlan dib ubilow ciyaarta.
Hagaajinta loogu talagalay macaamiisha ciyaartaan ayaa hawlgabi doonaa ka dib marka ay ciyaarta bilaabato
Custom optimization for this game will be enable after the game restarts
Beddel codka wakhtiga dhabta ah ee ciyaaraha. Geli %1$s.
Macluumaad lama heli karo. Fadlan iskuday mar kale hadhow
Isku day saamaynta iftiinka dhabta ah si aad u abuurto muuqaalo ciyaar oo macquul ah.
Cilada soo dejinta fidiyowga. Fadlan iskuday mar kale hadhow

%1$s detected large fluctuations in the game network during the last game, with %2$d obvious stalling cases. The maximum network latency is %3$dms. Enabling game network acceleration can reduce the latency to %4$dms and increase the network speed by %5$d%%
Hawlgabay Habka Ciyaarta loogu talagalay ciyaartan?
Dami dhallaalka laqabsiga leh iyo kahorjeed- hab aan kala sooc lahayn
Nidaamka baarista ayaa u baahan in laba jeer la sameeyo si isku xigxigta looga hor tago si shil ah uga baxo ciyaarta.
Marka Habka Ciyaarta la shido, iskumeel gaar ah dami dhallaalka laqabsiga si loo hubiyo dhallalka shaashadda ma saameeyo daboolida shilalka
Tus Gudiga Caawinta Ciyaarta si aad uhesho khibrad dheeri ah oo ciyaarta ah
Deji appka si aad udeegsato Habka Ciyaarta
Xadka sare ee istaraatijiyadaha ayaa la gaaray
Caadiyan %1$s Istaraatiijiyadaha ku jira Gudiga kaaliyaha ciyaarta ayaa halkan lagu muujiyey. Waxaad soo deji kartaa ama La wadaag istaraatiijiyadaha.
Ku guuldareystay in la soo dejiyo istaraatiijiyada. Fadlan hubi in moodeelku la jaanqaadayo
Istaraatiijiyada si guul leh ayaa loo soo dejiyay. Fadlan hubi ciyaarta ku habboon
Nuqul ka samee %1$s Nuqul erayga sirta ah oo la wadaag saaxiibbadaa. Moodooyinka ay taageerayaan %2$s Istaraatiijiyada: %3$s
Qabo oo jiid xagga sare si aad u beddesho booska.
Qabo oo jiid si aad u beddesho booska
Dhanka gudaha uu jiid si aad u firfirconeyso Guddiga Wanaagsan oo aad abka ugu furto daaqadaha sabaynaya.
Si firfircoon u bixi sifooyin caqli-gal ah sida qoraal-xiddid-waqtiga-dhabta ah iyo turjumaadda shaashadda-buuxa ee xaaladaha qaarkood.
Si dhakhso leh ugu fur abka daaqadaha sabaynaya
Muuqaalka Habka Ciyaarta hadda lama taageerin gudaha kala qaybinta-habka shaashadda
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Horey u heshay. Fadlan mar dambe ha sheegan
This may increase power consumption & phone temperature.
Ma jiro xiriir khad. Fadlan hubi khadkaaga oo mar kale isku day
Please insert a SIM card and try again
Gelitaanka wuu dhacay. Fadlan mar kale gal gudaha.
Habbee dareenka xakamaynta iyo ka jawaab celinta ku salaysan doorashadaada iyo heerkaaga xirfadeed.
Jawaabta tuubada ayaa aad u xasaasisan, ku haboon ciyaaraha MOBA.
Hawlgalku waa mid jawaab celin inbadan, oo ku habboon ciyaaraha toogashada.
Jawaabta taabashada waa mid xasaasi ah oo sax ah, oo ku habboon inta badan ciyaaraha.
Si buuxda uga hortag ogeysiinta inaad khalkhal geliso fiidiyowgaaga iyo aad horumariso khibradda aragtida.
Ugudub laga bilaawo geeska ee shaashadda sida fur Fidiyowga gudiga kaaliyaha.
New users can get %d day(s) of free VIP
Heshiiska Adeegga ee lagu daray qiimaha
